title: GEEPAS 3D Number Wall Clock Black Analog Silent Timepiece, Modern Glass Cover Design for Home Living Room Office Decor, Non-Ticking Battery Operated, 2 Year Warranty
features: ✅ Modern Minimalist Design: The clock face is sleek, clean and simple, with silver 3D lettering on a black background providing a clear view; the surface is covered with glass to keep out dust and water vapor; the clock frame is made of ABS material for long-lasting use and durability.
✅ ACCURATE TIME: Operated by 1.5V AA battery, the precise movement will give you accurate time. (Note: Battery is not provided. )

✅ NO ANNOYING TICKING: The quiet sweep movement offers a second hand that moves in a continuous motion around the dial with no-ticking. Providing you a quiet environment without any humming sound. It won't affect your family's sleeping or working efficiency.

✅ BROAD APPLICATION: A practical addition to use in school, dining rooms, living rooms, family rooms, bedrooms, study room, office, lounge, hall or kitchen etc. You can also send it to your friends and families as a birthday or holiday gift.
✅ EASY TO HANG : Come with a hook can be easily installed through the slot on the back of the clock.
description: Product Description SILENT QUARTZ MOVEMENT Precise quartz mechanism ensures accurate timekeeping with silent operation—no ticking sound, perfect for quiet spaces and everyday comfort. MODERN & ELEGANT DESIGN Features a sleek, contemporary look with refined details—perfect for adding a touch of style to any outfit, room, or personal accessory collection. EASY TO HANG Designed with a built-in hook or keyhole slot for quick wall mounting. Lightweight and hassle-free—hangs securely on any wall surface in seconds. BATTERY OPERATED Runs on standard batteries for easy, wire-free use. No messy cords—just insert batteries and enjoy reliable performance anywhere, anytime. VERSATILE PLACEMENT Suitable for any room—hang it in the living room, kitchen, bedroom, or office. Complements all decor styles with its clean, modern look. LIGHTWEIGHT & DURABLE Crafted from sturdy yet lightweight materials for long-lasting use. Easy to handle and hang, making it ideal for any room or setting. SLEEK DESIGN Minimalist and stylish, the sleek design adds a modern touch to any space. Blends seamlessly with home or office décor for a clean, elegant look. DURABLE & LONG-LASTING Built with high-quality materials for strength and reliability. Designed to withstand daily use and deliver consistent performance over time.
